name: Shadow
description: Connect agents to Shadow chat platform with servers, channels, and buddy avatars

bindings.description: Binding rules connecting buddies to agents and channels

greeting.description: Greeting and entry-channel behavior for provisioned Shadow spaces

serverApps.description: Apps to install from the catalog or manifest and grant to provisioned buddies

id.description: Stable template id for this App installation

serverId.description: Server config id that owns this app

catalogAppKey.description: Shadow App catalog app key to resolve and install

manifestUrl.description: Manifest URL fallback when not installing from catalog

manifest.description: Inline manifest fallback when not installing from catalog

grants.description: Buddy grants applied after app installation
